blocks.text: The provider adapter port is the narrow SPI between provider-specific CLIs and provider-neutral runtime actors.

items: Detect reports local provider capability without mutating the public capability model.
BuildStart returns a daemon-owned StartCommand with protocol-critical args enforced by the adapter.
Parser and Translate convert provider output into run-scope events, commands, and drafts.
Cancel, Interrupt, ProvideInput, ResolveApproval, PinSession, and ResumeSession remain runtime commands, not client UX actions.

blocks.text: The port may expose provider event drafts, but only the supervisor/control-plane path can append canonical IR.
